name: greet_user_context
description: Prepare personalized greeting based on user context, time, and recent activity

name: suggest_next_action
description: Analyze recent activity and suggest the most productive next action

name: summarize_daily_progress
description: Generate end-of-day summary of tasks completed, patterns discovered, and metrics

name: detect_user_frustration
description: Monitor interaction patterns for signs of frustration and suggest breaks or pivots

name: curate_learning_resources
description: Based on current skill gaps, suggest relevant tutorials, docs, and exercises

name: sync_cross_device_state
description: Sync workspace state across IDE, web, and mobile channels

name: generate_standup_report
description: Auto-generate daily standup report from git commits, pipeline runs, and task completions

name: check_focus_mode
description: Determine if user is in deep focus and suppress non-critical notifications

name: archive_completed_context
description: Move completed project context to long-term vector memory (T2)

name: prepare_session_resume
description: Pre-warm context for next session based on predicted user needs
